channel.title: Comments on: Berkshire Brewing Company
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Beth Webb
item.dc:creator: Beth Webb
item.description: Hey, I enjoyed the interview. I learned a lot about the BBC. My husband and I are both fans of the Steel Rail Pale Ale.
item.content:encoded: Hey, I enjoyed the interview. I learned a lot about the BBC. My husband and I are both fans of the Steel Rail Pale Ale.

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Hey Kurt, Unfortunately I don't think you can get them in Philly. The BBC mostly self distributes throughout New England at the moment - but thats not to say that they won't widen their distribution if they continue their growth.
item.content:encoded:
Hey Kurt,
Unfortunately I don’t think you can get them in Philly. The BBC mostly self distributes throughout New England at the moment – but thats not to say that they won’t widen their distribution if they continue their growth.

item.title: By: Kurt
item.dc:creator: Kurt
item.description: Very interesting. Can one find any Berkshire Brewing beers in Philadelphia?
item.content:encoded: Very interesting. Can one find any Berkshire Brewing beers in Philadelphia?

item.title: By: Diana
item.dc:creator: Diana
item.description: I went out and bought a case of Steel Rail Extra Pale Ale....it is a very good beer! Great taste. Smooth. No after taste. I am impressed. Thanks to Michael Tesoro and Beer America TV for bringing this new find to my attention.
item.content:encoded:
I went out and bought a case of Steel Rail Extra Pale Ale….it is a very good beer!
Great taste. Smooth. No after taste. I am impressed.
Thanks to Michael Tesoro and Beer America TV for bringing this new find to my attention.

item.title: By: Steve
item.dc:creator: Steve
item.description: Well done. I'll look for the beers. Nope, Dan Rather would have sworn this guy was a draft dodger from the sixties hiding out in a brewery, whose ticket the Bush admin wouldn't fix...
item.content:encoded: Well done. I’ll look for the beers. Nope, Dan Rather would have sworn this guy was a draft dodger from the sixties hiding out in a brewery, whose ticket the Bush admin wouldn’t fix…

item.title: By: Rabs
item.dc:creator: Rabs
item.description: Very well done. We need more Michael time. I think I remember seeing that guy being interviewed by Dan Rather 25 years ago...
item.content:encoded: Very well done. We need more Michael time. I think I remember seeing that guy being interviewed by Dan Rather 25 years ago…

item.title: By: Tom Penichter
item.dc:creator: Tom Penichter
item.description: Watching Michael made my mouth water.
